name: plano-contas-iob
description: API multi-tenant CNPJ x Plano de Contas - IOB SAGE

scripts.check: node --check server.js && for f in parser-*.js api-adapter.js historicos-padrao.js historicos-routes.js vincular-empresa.js vincular-folha-pagamento.js layouts-bancarios-padrao.js layout-quality-cases.js layout-quality-evidence.js auditai/conciliacao-arquivos.js scripts/check-duplicate-routes.js scripts/test-layouts.js scripts/test-bb-conta-atual.js scripts/test-safra-extrato.js scripts/test-clude-itau-historicos.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && node scripts/check-duplicate-routes.js && npm run test:layouts && npm run test:bb && npm run test:safra && npm run test:clude-itau
